name: Windham Golf Course
about: Windham Golf Course offers both traditional golf and high-tech simulation experiences. The facility features an 18-hole golf course with a vintage 1922 design and Trackman indoor golf simulators that use dual-radar technology for accurate ball tracking and swing data. The venue includes dining options at Fairways Bar & Grill and hosts events such as weddings, banquets, and tournaments. The simulators are available year-round, allowing play regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round simulator access with Trackman's dual-radar technology
On-site dining with outdoor deck views
Variety of events including leagues and tournaments

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service at Fairways Bar & Grill with creative pub fare
No mention of alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar technology for ultra-accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own set for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food service at Fairways Bar & Grill but doesn't mention a policy on outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing information for simulator rounds.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Windham Golf Course appears to be family-friendly with mentions of family events and a welcoming atmosphere.
